nasb.text: Nevertheless, he clung to the sins of Jeroboam the son of Nebat, which he made Israel sin; he did not depart from them.

esv.text: Nevertheless, he clung to the sin of Jeroboam the son of Nebat, which he made Israel to sin; he did not depart from it.

cnv.text: 只是尼八的兒子耶羅波安使以色列人陷在罪中的那些罪，他卻堅持不捨，不肯脫離。

ccb.text: 可是他沉溺于尼八的儿子耶罗波安所犯的罪恶，使以色列人陷入罪中。
